creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 171006
Update libcxxrt to upstream 2016-03-29 version

Here is a patch to update devel/libcxxrt to the same version that is currently in the base system in head, corresponding to the last upstream commit on 2016-03-29.

All the patches that were formerly in files/ have been applied upstream, so the directory can be emptied now.
